title: [Comb] Missed optimization opportunity for multiply used boolean operations

features.name: redundant AND with same operand in multi-use scenario
features.description: Code should include two consecutive AND operations where the second AND uses the same operand as the first AND, and the first result is also used directly

features.name: intermediate wire used in subsequent same-operand boolean
features.description: Code should include an intermediate wire result from a binary operation that is then used in another binary operation with one of the same operands
